title: Murios
description: Enhance your Minecraft adventures with more vanilla-style gear!
body:
**"Enhance your Minecraft adventures with more vanilla-style gear!"**

![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/862391/description_6342c3c6-2d42-4ee6-9f3a-347cbe69b456.gif)

Murios adds a variety of new tools, weapons, and armor that integrate with Minecraft's vanilla design. With exciting new features like the emerald tier and unique weapon mechanics, Murios enhances your gameplay while staying true to the core experience.

* * *

### **Features**

#### **New Emerald Tier**

Upgrade your **Diamond Gear** to **Emerald Gear** for a superior tier:

*   **Better than Diamond**:  
    *   Higher durability
    *   Gold-like efficiency and enchantability
    *   Cheaper repairs (uses emeralds instead of diamonds)

#### **Emerald Upgrade Smithing Template**

*   **How to Obtain**:  
    *   **Wandering Trader Drops**:
    *   99% chance to drop **1-3 Emeralds**
    *   1% chance to drop the **Emerald Upgrade Smithing Template**
    *   **Wandering Trader Trades**:
    *   Purchase for **7 Diamonds + 1 Emerald Block**
*   **Template Duplication**:  
    *   Combine:
    *   **7 Diamonds**
    *   **1 Emerald Block**
    *   **Emerald Upgrade Smithing Template**  
        In a Crafting Table

* * *

#### **New Weapons and Tools**

*   **Daggers**: Ultra-fast strikes, **twice as fast as swords**, perfect for rapid combat.
*   **Battleaxes**: Heavy hitters with greater damage but slower attack speed.
*   **Spears**: Balanced weapons, faster than swords but slower than daggers.
*   **Paxels**: A multi-functional tool combining **pickaxe**, **shovel**, and **axe**.

**Available in All Materials**:

*   Wooden
*   Stone
*   Iron
*   Gold
*   Diamond
*   Netherite
*   Emerald

* * *

### **Wandering Trader Overhaul**

*   **Improved Drops**:  
    *   99% chance to drop **1-3 Emeralds**
    *   1% chance to drop the **Emerald Upgrade Smithing Template**
*   **Exclusive Trades**:  
    *   Offers **Emerald Upgrade Smithing Template** for **7 Diamonds + 1 Emerald Block**

* * *

### **Why Murios?**

Murios brings exciting new options to your Minecraft world while keeping everything somewhat balanced and familiar. With its vanilla-style textures and mechanics, the mod feels like an organic extension of the base game, giving you more tools and strategies to enjoy.

* * *

### **What's New in This Release?**

*   **Emerald Gear**: Upgrade diamond to emerald with new smithing mechanics.
*   **Daggers**: Now twice as fast as swords for lightning-quick combat.
*   **Spears** and **Paxels**: Available in all materials, including emerald.
*   **Template Duplication**: Requires **7 Diamonds + 1 Emerald Block + Template**.
*   **Wandering Trader Enhancements**: Improved drops and special trades.

* * *

Dive into Murios and redefine your adventures with more tools, weapons, and possibilities! Download now!
